fixtures.title: Single-storey clear scanned plan
criticalChecks: Exterior perimeter is closed
All bedroom and bathroom doors are detected
Main living/kitchen open-plan area is not split by invented walls

fixtures.title: Low-contrast phone scan
criticalChecks: Faint interior partition walls are detected
Furniture and room labels are ignored as walls
Door arcs remain doors, not wall fragments

fixtures.title: Dimensioned scanned plan with stairs
criticalChecks: Stairs are detected as stairs, not a room
Printed dimension lines are ignored as walls
Scale uses printed dimensions when available

fixtures.title: Real wide residential floor plan, 40 by 30 feet
criticalChecks: Outer 40 by 30 foot perimeter is recognized as the main building shell
Bedroom, bathroom, closet, washroom, kitchen, dining, and family areas are detected as usable spaces
Windows and door swings are detected without turning beds, cabinets, or labels into walls

fixtures.title: Real dimensioned site plan ground floor
criticalChecks: Red property boundary and green setback lines are ignored as building walls
Ground floor walls, terrace openings, stair, bath/toilet, and kitchen/living spaces are detected
Printed metric dimensions are used as scale hints rather than structural elements

fixtures.title: Real dimensioned site plan upper floor
criticalChecks: Red property boundary and green setback lines are ignored as building walls
Upper floor bedroom walls, WC, closet, stair, terrace, doors, and windows are detected
Dimension strings and arrows are used as measurements rather than walls

fixtures.title: Real CAD plan with lot boundary and setbacks (127 sqm building)
criticalChecks: Lot dimensions (15.00m / 19.45m / 19.97m / 14.99m) are NOT used as building scale or coverage targets
The 32-wall direct CV trace is kept; no fallback to model-drawn geometry
Scale comes from interior mm dimension chains (~43-45 px/m); building bounds ~12.5m x ~10.4m, not lot-sized
Bedroom, bath, stairs, living/dining walls and the covered-terrace edge are present and connected
